rationale: In the citing paper, the cited work appears only as a single methodological reference when the authors explain that their conjoint experiment was made incentive-aligned. The citation is not used to build the gift-choice theory, derive hypotheses, specify the Bayesian gift-choice model, or interpret the substantive results. There is no clear reuse of a specific mechanism or model component from the cited paper in the core analysis, so its role is a passing procedural precedent.
